chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2220 of 2017 CP D 6372 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.11016/2017 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2025 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel notices have been impugned in these petitions, however, the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that notices be adjudicated vide speaking order; after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner; and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
